title: Stardew GUI Pack
description: A GUI pack inspired by Stardew Valley -Credit to Concerned Ape
body:
# Stardew GUI Pack

### Complete overhaul of vanilla menus/GUI
- Retextures all menus except Advancements (planned for future versions).
- All block interfaces
- Survival HUD
- Villager trading
- Horse GUI

Check [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stardew-gui-pack/gallery) for screenshots.

[Jade addon pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stardew-valley-theme-for-jade), Credit to [Snownee](https://modrinth.com/user/Snownee)
